lastRunSummary: Fixed Last Rope Standing (directional kick mechanic, 55 tests) and Midnight Rodeo (iOS touch fallback, 39 tests). Game 42 Coyote Call state finalized.

gameQueue.title: Wanted: Reward
gameQueue.concept: Bounty hunter economics: a new wanted poster appears each round showing a fugitive's traits (hat color, build, scar, weapon). Scan a scrolling crowd of silhouettes for the match. First correct ID earns full reward; wrong IDs reduce the payout. Each round: more fugitives, similar-looking decoys, crowd density increases.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First visual search mechanic in series (scan crowd vs memory test), first multi-trait composite matching, first economic payout mechanic tied to accuracy rather than speed alone

gameQueue.title: Trail Blaze
gameQueue.concept: Wilderness pathfinding strategy: draw a trail through procedurally generated terrain (mountains, rivers, desert, forest) from a starting camp to a destination. Each terrain type has a travel-cost multiplier. Supplies drain per tile crossed. Find the path that reaches the destination before supplies run out. New route threats each round: seasonal floods, rockslides, rival wagon trains.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First player-drawn pathfinding mechanic in series, first terrain-cost strategy layer, first game where the challenge is route optimization rather than reaction or memory

runLog.summary: Built Game 24: Dead Reckoning - celestial navigation, star bearing lines, 5-round terrain puzzle, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 25: Fence Line - construction/placement mechanic, wind gusts, cattle gap-seek AI, 5 levels, 42 tests pass.
Built Game 26: Dust Storm - fog-of-war visibility cone, lane-dodge stagecoach, 42 tests pass.
Built Game 27: River Run - white-water raft, inertia model, current-reading swirls, 42 tests pass.
Built Game 28: Brand Iron - path-tracing drag mechanic, heat sweet-zone gauge, 45 tests pass.
Built Game 29: Jail Break - turn-based stealth escape, vision cones, pick-lock, object-throw, shadow zones, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 30: Tumbleweed Pinball - physics pinball engine, cactus bumpers, WANTED poster targets, chain multiplier (1x-8x), drain post deflector, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 31: Pony Express - action-rhythm horse riding, 5 escalating BPM sections, 16th-note beat grid, speed-sync feedback loop, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 32: Barbed Wire - strategic wire-laying tower defense, post-node graph mechanic, MAX_CONN=2 constraint, 5 waves, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 33: Cattle Auction - economic bidding simulation, 6-buyer behavioral AI, going-once call mechanic, heat-bar urgency, 8 lots, 75 tests pass.
Built Game 34: Dust Devil Dance - generative music sandbox, draw paths for dust devils, pentatonic oscillators, landmark audio effects, resonance meter, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 35: Snake Canyon - first-person procedural maze, DFS canyon generation, audio-spatial rattlesnake, footstep timing mechanic, 26 tests pass.
Built Game 36: Rodeo Queen - skill-chain combo, 3 distinct events, 5x multiplier, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 37: Tumbledown Town - Verlet physics demolition puzzle, diagonal brace coupling, 5 levels, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 38: Dust Road Derby - top-down oval racer, parametric track, rubber-band AI rivals, slipstream draft mechanic, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 39: Last Rope Standing - pendulum grapple survival, constraint physics, rising floodwaters, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 40: Wire Tap - telegraph Morse code decoder, dot/dash audio classification, 3-round map identification, 51 tests pass.
Built Game 41: Gold Panner - particle physics pan-tilt, density stratification, claim jumper, 22 tests pass.
Built Game 42: Coyote Call - real-time pitch matching, oscilloscope dual-waveform, coyote howl synthesis, trust/scare dual meter, 26 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added roundRect polyfill (missing in Chrome <99/Safari <15.4) and touch-action:none on canvas. 36 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added touchstart handler; devices that do not fire pointerdown for touch now respond. 38 tests pass.
Fixed Last Rope Standing: directional kick mechanic (KICK_FORCE=500) gives players speed to reach higher platforms. 55 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: iOS position:fixed viewport, load-event resize, document-level touch fallback, guard condition fix (=== flex vs !== none). 39 tests pass.
